boundary_rule: AGENTS: This board is scoped to ONE project. Do NOT create, read, or act on jobs from other projects. Cross-project requests go to Dispatch (the coordinator). See docs/JOB_BOARD.md — Project Boundary Enforcement.

jobs.subject: Update OQE discipline to require minimum 5 testable criteria per objective
jobs.problem: The OQE Objective phase lacked a structured problem statement, causing agents to jump to solutions without articulating what was wrong or why it mattered. Without the Problem -> Objective -> Criteria flow, criteria were written without grounding and confidence assessment had no baseline to compare against.
criteria: docs/OQE_DISCIPLINE.md updated with minimum 5 criteria requirement, worked example, and bad-criteria rejection language
CLAUDE.md OQE summary section references the 5-criteria minimum and test-plan framing
templates/AGENT_TEMPLATE.md OQE section includes the criteria requirement so new personas inherit it
personas/REVIEWER_AGENT.md updated to explicitly check for 5-criteria minimum on every review, flag vague criteria
Grep verification confirms '5 success criteria' or 'minimum of 5' appears in all 4 target files
Job board entry itself demonstrates the criteria pattern with 6 OQE criteria tracked in state/job-board.json

review_history.note: 6-gate review PASS: criteria count (6>=5), all criteria specific+observable+traceable, evidence mapped 1:1 via grep verification, Completion Gate present, no Cary markers in artifacts, deliverable matches objective
